---
title: "Connected Papers"
description: "An academic-paper exploration tool sponsored in part by Microsoft Azure."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-09-15"
categories: [research, paper, Microsoft, Azure, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Connected Papers. Image from [Connected Papers](https://www.connectedpapers.com/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Awesome research tool sponsored in part by Microsoft Azure!

<https://lnkd.in/gAfj6Kw>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_connected-papers-find-and-explore-academic-activity-6711541233203982336-cUai).*
